name: Tennessee Army National Guard - Personal Financial Counselor
description_short: Free financial counseling service for Tennessee Army and Air National Guard members and families, offering budget planning, debt management, and retirement guidance from certified financial planners.
description_long:
Tennessee Army National Guard's Personal Financial Counselor program provides complimentary financial planning and counseling exclusively to active members of the Tennessee Army and Air National Guard, as well as their families. The program is administered through the state military department's employment assistance initiatives and leverages certified financial professionals across multiple regional offices throughout Tennessee.

The service offers comprehensive financial counseling covering budgeting, debt and credit card management, credit score improvement, emergency fund establishment, estate planning documents, homebuying guidance, vehicle purchases, investment strategies including Thrift Savings Plan optimization, and retirement planning. Counselors work with clients to create personal net worth statements and develop both short and long-term financial strategies. All services are provided at no cost to eligible military members.

What distinguishes this program is its exclusive access limited to Tennessee National Guard members and families, its regional coverage with dedicated counselors in Knoxville, Nashville, Memphis, Jackson, and Chattanooga, and the use of credentialed financial professionals (Certified Financial Planners, ChFC, and AFC designations). The program emphasizes anonymous, confidential counseling and positions itself as a military-specific benefit rather than a general nonprofit credit counseling service.

As a free service, this program has genuine value for eligible military members seeking professional guidance. However, availability is strictly limited to National Guard members, and the program appears to operate through contracted third-party providers (BCB Holdings LLC and Zeiders Associates) rather than as an in-house government operation, which may affect consistency and accessibility across all regions.
address: Hugh B. Mott Building, 3041 Sidco Dr room 108, Nashville, TN 37204

company_info.headquarters: Hugh B. Mott Building, 3041 Sidco Dr room 108, Nashville, TN 37204

pros: Completely free financial counseling for eligible members with no hidden fees
Services provided by credentialed professionals (CFP™, ChFC, AFC® designations)
Statewide coverage with regional offices in five major Tennessee cities
Comprehensive services including estate planning (wills, powers of attorney)
Specialized guidance on military-specific retirement accounts (Thrift Savings Plan)
No credit score requirements or financial background needed for eligibility
cons: Eligibility strictly limited to Tennessee Army and Air National Guard members and families only
Regional availability limited to five service areas; rural members may face distance barriers
No indication of evening or weekend hours; may require time off work for appointments
Program relies on contracted third-party providers, not direct government staff
No online counseling option mentioned; all services appear to be in-person or phone-based
best_for: Tennessee Army and Air National Guard members seeking debt management and budget planning
Military families planning major financial decisions like homebuying or retirement
National Guard members wanting to optimize Thrift Savings Plan investments
Service members working to improve credit scores and establish emergency savings
diagnosis: This program is ideal for Tennessee National Guard members and their families who need professional financial guidance at no cost. The primary caveat is strict eligibility limited to active Guard members in Tennessee, making it inaccessible to the general public or military families in other states.
services: Credit score and credit report improvement
Will and healthcare/financial power of attorney creation
Home purchase counseling and mortgage education
Short, mid, and long-term investment strategies
Thrift Savings Plan (TSP) investment strategy optimization
